# Kaisa Laga — Verified visit-based reviews for restaurants, cafes, and hotels

> Reviews from real visits, not random internet noise.

Kaisa Laga is a verified customer feedback and trust platform for India. Guests scan a QR after a real visit and answer "Kaisa laga?" with quick voice or text feedback. Businesses get AI insights, complaint alerts, and a private recovery window before eligible reviews publish. Future guests discover places through honest feedback from people who were actually there.

## Who it's for

- **Diners and guests:** discover and read verified visit-based reviews on the public site.
- **Restaurants, cafes, hotels:** onboard via the business path to collect feedback, recover unhappy guests privately, and build a trustworthy public profile.

## How it works

1. Guest visits an onboarded venue.
2. Guest scans the venue QR and leaves short voice or text feedback.
3. AI transcribes and classifies the feedback for the business.
4. Business gets alerts, themes, and a ~7-day private preview/recovery window.
5. After the window, eligible verified reviews can publish for public discovery.

## Trust rules

- Reviews only exist for businesses that have signed up with Kaisa Laga.
- Feedback must come from a verified visit submission — no scraped or drive-by ratings.
- Businesses cannot pay to delete negative reviews; responses and resolution status stay visible.

## Resources

- [Main site](https://kaisa-laga.vercel.app)
- [Operator sign-in](https://kaisa-laga.vercel.app/sign-in)
